infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Poolyn needs your location to find carpool matches near your route.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Poolyn uses your location during active rides so passengers can see your ETA.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Poolyn uses the camera so you can take a photo of your vehicle for verification.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Poolyn accesses your photos so you can upload a vehicle image.

plugins.photosPermission: Poolyn accesses your photos so you can upload a vehicle image.
plugins.cameraPermission: Poolyn uses the camera so you can take a photo of your vehicle for verification.
